items.title_en: Asia markets open lower as fragile Middle East ceasefire tempers sentiment
items.title_zh: 中东停火协议脆弱，影响市场情绪，亚洲股市低开
items.desc_en: Asia-Pacific markets open lower Friday as an Israel-Lebanon ceasefire tempered risk appetite, even after Wall Street closed at fresh record highs.
items.desc_zh: 尽管华尔街收盘创下历史新高，但由于以色列和黎巴嫩停火缓和了风险偏好，亚太市场周五开盘走低。

items.title_en: Oil falls as Trump reiterates Iran war ‘should’ end soon and Israel-Lebanon truce lifts hopes

items.desc_zh: 凯巴·塞巴以反对法国在非洲的影响力和支持西非军事领导人而闻名。

items.title_en: Turkish police order 83 arrests over online praise for school shootings
items.title_zh: 土耳其警方因网上赞扬校园枪击事件而下令逮捕 83 人
items.desc_en: At least nine were killed in a school shooting in southern Turkey on Wednesday, a day after another attack injured 16 people at a high school.
items.desc_zh: 土耳其南部周三发生校园枪击事件，造成至少 9 人死亡，一天前，一所高中又发生一起袭击事件，造成 16 人受伤。

items.title_en: South African opposition figure Malema sentenced to five years in prison
items.title_zh: 南非反对派人物马勒马被判五年监禁
items.desc_en: Malema is appealing against the decision to prevent him from being taken to prison on Thursday.
items.desc_zh: 马勒马正在对周四阻止他入狱的决定提出上诉。

items.title_en: Satellite images reveal scale of Israeli demolitions as Lebanese villages destroyed
items.title_zh: 卫星图像显示以色列拆除黎巴嫩村庄的规模
items.desc_en: BBC Verify analysis found more than 1,400 buildings had been destroyed since 2 March.
items.desc_zh: BBC verify 分析发现，自 3 月 2 日以来，已有 1,400 多座建筑物被毁。

items.title_en: 'Unprecedented' fire at Australian oil refinery to impact nation's petrol supplies
items.title_zh: 澳大利亚炼油厂发生“史无前例”的火灾，影响国家汽油供应
items.desc_en: The fire has deepened fears over the nation's petrol supplies amid a global crunch.
items.desc_zh: 在全球紧缩的情况下，这场火灾加深了人们对美国石油供应的担忧。

items.desc_zh: 该旅游平台表示，它已更改 Pin 图以保护客户，但未透露有多少人受到影响。

items.desc_en: The tech giant said it will punish sites that block back button navigation from June.
items.desc_zh: 这家科技巨头表示，将从 6 月份开始惩罚屏蔽后退按钮导航的网站。

items.title_en: Roblox defends expanded age‑checks after parents raise concerns over errors
items.title_zh: 在家长对错误表示担忧后，Roblox 为扩大年龄检查辩护
items.desc_en: With 144m daily users, the gaming company is extending its tech to introduce two age‑specific accounts.
items.desc_zh: 该游戏公司拥有 1.44 亿每日用户，正在扩展其技术，推出两个特定年龄的帐户。

items.title_en: GTA-maker Rockstar Games hacked again but downplays impact
items.title_zh: GTA 制作商 Rockstar Games 再次遭到黑客攻击，但淡化影响
items.desc_en: The incident marks the second time the games giant has been hacked by young, English-speaking hackers.
items.desc_zh: 此次事件标志着这家游戏巨头第二次遭到年轻的英语黑客的攻击。

items.title_zh: OpenAI 老板萨姆·奥尔特曼 (Sam Altman) 的家遭到燃烧弹攻击
items.desc_en: San Francisco police have arrested a 20-year-old suspect after a perimeter gate was set alight.
items.desc_zh: 旧金山警方在外围大门被纵火后逮捕了一名 20 岁的嫌疑人。

items.title_en: Great at gaming? US air traffic control wants you to apply
items.title_zh: 擅长游戏？美国空中交通管制中心希望您申请
items.desc_en: A new government ad campaign is trying to persuade gamers to apply for air safety roles.
items.desc_zh: 一项新的政府广告活动正试图说服游戏玩家申请航空安全职位。

items.title_en: Meta pulls Facebook ads recruiting for social media addiction lawsuits
items.title_zh: Meta 因社交媒体成瘾诉讼而撤回 Facebook 广告招募
items.desc_en: The Facebook owner recently lost a landmark social media addiction trial in California
items.desc_zh: Facebook 所有者最近在加州一场具有里程碑意义的社交媒体成瘾审判中败诉

items.title_en: Dancer with MND performs on stage again through digital avatar
items.title_zh: 患有 MND 的舞者通过数字化身再次登台表演

items.desc_zh: 布里安娜·奥尔森 (Breanna Olson) 表示，脑电波技术能够重新建立她认为已经消失的表情和联系。
